positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_sporting_event
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u9,axiom,
    sporting_event(summer_olympics)).

cnf(u10,negated_conjecture,
    ~sporting_event(world_championships)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define held_in(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define won_most_medals_in(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
